taxonomy: Aylostera tafnaensis is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is a type of globular cactus native to the Tafna region in Algeria. The classification of Aylostera tafnaensis is within the genus Aylostera and more broadly within the subfamily Rebutia and tribe Rebutieae. Additionally, Aylostera tafnaensis is also known to be closely related to the genus Sulcorebutia. Its classification is further refined within the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms.
